deploy.name: deploy_docker_compose_config
deploy.stdout_tail:
name: backend
services:
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: staybooking
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: secret
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
    image: postgres:15
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5432"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: postgres_data
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: backend_default
volumes:
  postgres_data:
    name: backend_postgres_data
